title: [YTP] A GarfifraG Chrapmas, Pt. 1
description:
The classic Christmas special where GarfifraG, JoJ, and his dog Odor all go to visit family for the holidildohs.

Side note: There was a slight issue rendering audio due to unusual video framerate, so if splices don't seem as clean this is why.  They sounded better before rendering.  Didn't wanna have to redo hours of work by changing the framerate after everything was done, but I should've caught the problem earlier.
